column31: If "total" (Y) is not equal to 0, enter number from "total" column
If "total" is equal to 0, enter result from "present" (V) column
If the "present" column has no data entered, 0 is entered automatically

column29: Total number of species is lower in 2020 because there were only 5 participants (due to the COVID-19 pandemic) and no full checklist was kept
The Evening Grosbeak recorded in 2021 may have been written down in error
